name: Millrock Resources Inc.
summary: Millrock Resources Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties primarily in the state of Alaska and Mexico. It explores for gold, copper, porphyry, silver, and other metals. The company holds an interest in the Liberty Bell property; 64North Gold project; Chisna DragonSlayer project; and Apex El Nido located in Alaska. It also holds an interest in the Guadalcazar, El Batamote project situated in Mexico. Millrock Resources Inc. was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
